_note: D? Technology Scorecard — 1 dashboard + 11 headline CIO KPIs (one per IT discipline) for Metric Studio. All read veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month (1 row/month). Percent metrics: formatter.scale='fraction' (exec stores ratios as fractions); threshold/target values in DISPLAY-percent units. Thresholds/targets are demo defaults — tune against live numbers after the first pipeline run. Create the dashboard first, then each metric (its dashboards[] pins it here).

definition.description: North-star IT KPIs — availability, change/DORA, security, FinOps, service desk, clinician experience. CIO / technology exec.
Fleet-wide uptime — 1 minus downtime over fleet-minutes. The reliability north-star (ITSM / SRE).
definition.sql: SELECT service_availability_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, service_availability_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Sev1 incidents this month. The board's reliability-risk signal (ITSM / SRE).
definition.sql: SELECT major_incident_count AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, major_incident_count AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Mean time to resolve incidents. Lower means faster recovery (ITSM / SRE).
definition.sql: SELECT mttr_minutes AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, mttr_minutes AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Share of changes that fail or cause incident. A core DORA delivery-quality lever.
definition.sql: SELECT change_failure_rate AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, change_failure_rate AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Mean hours from change request to deploy. DORA delivery-velocity signal.
definition.sql: SELECT change_lead_time_hours AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, change_lead_time_hours AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Critical-severity vulnerabilities still open at month-end. The SecOps exposure north-star.
definition.sql: SELECT open_critical_vulns AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, open_critical_vulns AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Share of decided vulnerabilities remediated outside SLA. SecOps remediation-discipline signal.
definition.sql: SELECT vuln_sla_breach_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, vuln_sla_breach_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Total IT spend this month across run + change (FinOps / TBM).
definition.sql: SELECT it_spend_total AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, it_spend_total AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Idle/waste as a share of cloud spend. The FinOps optimization lever — lower is leaner.
definition.sql: SELECT cloud_idle_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, cloud_idle_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Share of tickets resolved via self-service. The Service Desk efficiency lever.
definition.sql: SELECT self_service_deflection_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, self_service_deflection_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Clinician EHR time outside scheduled hours ('pajama time'). DEX burnout signal — lower is healthier.
definition.sql: SELECT ehr_after_hours_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, ehr_after_hours_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Share of active providers using AI clinical tools. The AI-leverage growth signal.
definition.sql: SELECT ai_adoption_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, ai_adoption_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_it_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13
